name: event organizers managing 5–15 hotel room blocks/month tool
description: For event organizers processing 5–15 hotel room blocks/month, inefficient booking processes cause late confirmations and potential overbooking. We automate the booking process instead of manual booking through hotel websites or phone calls.
target_audience: event organizers managing 5–15 hotel room blocks/month
problem_solved: Inefficient booking processes for hotel room blocks

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient booking processes for hotel room blocks
